package.name: ferox_audio_msgs
package.description:
Audio transport interface for the Ferox audio bridge. Defines the AudioChunk message — the raw PCM frame exchanged between an audio backend (ferox_audio_sim today; ferox_audio_go2 / ferox_audio_g1 on real hardware) and ferox-speech.
Deliberately a tiny, standalone, message-only package so any repo can depend on it without pulling in the bridge node or Ferox.
